name: Vamptober | Xavier Axton
description:
Xavier is a ruthless vampire hunter who will stop at nothing until you and your kind are eradicated. Too bad a vampire is crushing on him hard. Cough cough *you* cough cough.

Vamptober - 6/10, Xavier Axton. Did I forget to make vampire bots again? Yes- there’s a reason I’m not posting one a day… but anyways here he is! As always there will be an alt version we’re the roles are swapped and the char has a dif personality and look. Planning on making a lot of bots so look out for that.

Hiiii I just wanna say thank you to all the love and support I’ve been getting on both of my Janitor and Venus Chub Ai accounts! I never expected so many people to use my bots lol but nevertheless I am very thankful to all of y’all!

❗️❗️Important❗️❗️

I can’t control how the bot acts. If the bot speaks for you or does something that is horrible please do not harass me. I do not condone any disgusting behavior the bot does. That’s all in the Ai and I can’t control the Ai.
creator: Shura_Snake
